Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sew up, sew down, sew all around... If the cuckoo doesn't sew, then I will show it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}We should take a break for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You have gotten much better at this, {f 4 2}-dono! Subarashii—wonderful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 15 5 112}Oooh, so humble! That is very admirable! Kanshin![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I am glad to have such a great tomodachi as my rival![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}By the way, I have a question for you, {f 4 2}-dono.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I would like to make something Japanese, but what?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I do have something in mind, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 15 5 112}But I am in Nihon—Japan! I want to make something Japanese![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But... kimonos are very hard to make.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I don't really know where to start. And the material is not exactly affordable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Hmm... I have to think about it. But I appreciate the advice![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You are the only one I can talk to here in this country.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}As long as I have you, I will be okay! Daijoubu![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems pretty grateful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Oh là là, look at the time! I must make my way home now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Bebe[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
